title: Senior Radiologist at Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates:
Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital Asia Pacific Associates!
